title: Ballhaus Barmbek
original_title: Ballhaus Barmbek - Let's Kiss and Say Goodbye
overview: A study of the alienated people who frequent the Ballhaus Barmbek dance hall, including an obese El groupie, an old man reciting poetry, two young women and a regular dance employee.
